commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a tirith-backed pre-exec command scanner for gateway, sandbox, and node exec paths, exposed through a new tools.exec.commandSecurity config object.

Reproducibility: For the feature itself, reproduction is not applicable because current main has no commandSecurity surface. For the review blockers, yes: PR-head and upstream tirith source inspection show the scanner env, side-effect, and cwd paths with high confidence.
commands.review_followup: Contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer security/product approval are required; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof and the external scanner policy boundary is unsettled.

target.title: Security: add tirith pre-exec command scanning
